Trainer

Training loop with stability controls for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein.

Provides TitanTrainer, a production-grade training loop with gradient clipping, NaN detection and retry, rolling/best checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, CSV telemetry logging, GaLore low-rank gradient projection, and automatic mixed precision support.

class src.training.trainer.TitanTrainer(model: Module, config: Any | None, training_config: TrainingConfig | None = None, device: str | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Advanced trainer for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein with stability controls.

Implements a production-grade training loop with gradient accumulation, automatic mixed precision (AMP), gradient clipping, NaN detection with automatic retry and learning rate scaling, rolling and best-loss checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, GaLore low-rank gradient projection, and CSV telemetry logging.

model

The PyTorch model being trained.

config

Model configuration (UltraConfig or HF config).

training_config

TrainingConfig with stability parameters.

device

Resolved PyTorch device string.

optimizer

Configured optimizer with per-component parameter groups.

scaler

AMP gradient scaler.

scheduler

Learning rate scheduler with warmup.

storage_manager

StorageManager for disk usage tracking.

global_step

Current global training step counter.

best_loss

Best (lowest) loss observed so far.

gradient_accumulation_steps

Number of steps between optimizer updates.

gpu_temp_guard

GPUTemperatureGuard for thermal safety.

__init__(model: Module, config: Any | None, training_config: TrainingConfig | None = None, device: str | None = None)[source]

Initialize the trainer.

Parameters:

  • model – PyTorch model to train.

  • config – Model configuration object (e.g. UltraConfig).

  • training_config – TrainingConfig with stability and checkpointing parameters. Uses defaults if None.

  • device – Target device string. Defaults to CUDA if available, otherwise CPU.

close()[source]

Cleanup resources

compute_mlm_loss(input_ids, attention_mask, labels)[source]

Compute masked language modeling loss with shape safety checks.

Handles both HF-style labels (-100 on unmasked tokens) and raw-sequence labels (infers masked positions by comparing input and label token IDs). Includes a fallback that forces at least one valid supervised token when no MLM targets exist.

Parameters:

  • input_ids – Token ID tensor of shape (B, S).

  • attention_mask – Attention mask tensor of shape (B, S).

  • labels – Label tensor of shape (B, S).

Returns:

Tuple of (loss, accuracy) where loss is a scalar tensor and accuracy is a scalar tensor in [0, 1].

Raises:

RuntimeError – If non-finite logits are detected, or if tensor shapes are mismatched.

load_checkpoint(checkpoint_path: str)[source]

Load a checkpoint and resume training state.

Restores model weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler state, global step, and best loss.

Parameters:

checkpoint_path – Path to the checkpoint file.

Returns:

The epoch number from the loaded checkpoint.

save_checkpoint(epoch: int, suffix: str = '', path: str = 'checkpoints') → str[source]

Save a comprehensive training checkpoint.

Includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler state, config, global step, and best loss.

Parameters:

  • epoch – Current epoch number.

  • suffix – Optional filename suffix (e.g. "_epoch_end").

  • path – Directory to save the checkpoint in.

Returns:

Absolute path to the saved checkpoint file.

save_pretrained_artifacts(output_dir: str, tokenizer: Any | None = None)[source]

Save HuggingFace-compatible model and tokenizer artifacts.

Parameters:

  • output_dir – Directory to save artifacts in.

  • tokenizer – Optional tokenizer with save_pretrained support.

Raises:

RuntimeError – If the model does not support save_pretrained.

train_epoch(dataloader: DataLoader, epoch: int) → Tuple[float, bool][source]

Train for one epoch with advanced monitoring.

Returns:

(average_loss, should_stop) should_stop is True if NaN was detected

Return type:

Tuple[float, bool]

class src.training.trainer.TrainingConfig(csv_log_path: str = 'training_metrics.csv', csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True, gpu_metrics_backend: str = 'nvml', nvml_device_index: int = 0, enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True, telemetry_log_interval: int = 1, gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True, switch_on_thermal: bool = False, gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0, gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0, gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: float | None = None, gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0, checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500, max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3, num_best_checkpoints: int = 2, nan_check_interval: int = 10, log_gradient_stats: bool = True, gradient_log_interval: int = 100, gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4, optimizer_class: str = 'adamw', optimizer_parameters: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000, scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1, scheduler_type: str = 'cosine', max_nan_retries: int = 3, grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0, inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0, min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10, inf_epoch_patience: int = 5, zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5, use_galore: bool = False, galore_rank: int = 64, galore_update_interval: int = 1, galore_scale: float = 1.0, galore_max_dim: int = 4096, use_amp: bool = False)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for training behavior, checkpointing, and stability controls.

csv_log_path

Path for CSV training metrics log.

Type:

str

csv_rotate_on_schema_change

If True, rotate the CSV file when the column schema changes instead of raising an error.

Type:

bool

gpu_metrics_backend

GPU telemetry backend ("nvml" or "none").

Type:

str

nvml_device_index

NVML device index for multi-GPU systems.

Type:

int

enable_block_grad_norms

Whether to collect per-block gradient norms.

Type:

bool

telemetry_log_interval

Steps between heavy telemetry collection.

Type:

int

gpu_temp_guard_enabled

Whether GPU thermal guard is enabled.

Type:

bool

switch_on_thermal

Whether GPU→CPU thermal switching is enabled.

Type:

bool

gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c

Temperature in Celsius above which training is paused.

Type:

float

gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c

Temperature in Celsius below which training resumes.

Type:

float

gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c

Optional critical temperature for emergency GPU→CPU offload.

Type:

float | None

gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds

Seconds between temperature polls while paused.

Type:

float

checkpoint_every_n_steps

Save a rolling checkpoint every N steps.

Type:

int

max_rolling_checkpoints

Maximum number of rolling checkpoints to keep.

Type:

int

num_best_checkpoints

Number of best-loss checkpoints to retain.

Type:

int

nan_check_interval

Check for NaN loss every N steps.

Type:

int

log_gradient_stats

Whether to log gradient statistics.

Type:

bool

gradient_log_interval

Steps between gradient stat logging.

Type:

int

gradient_accumulation_steps

Number of steps to accumulate gradients before an optimizer update.

Type:

int

optimizer_class

Optimizer class name (e.g. "adamw").

Type:

str

optimizer_parameters

Dictionary of optimizer-specific parameters.

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

scheduler_total_steps

Total steps for the learning rate scheduler.

Type:

int

scheduler_warmup_ratio

Fraction of total steps used for warmup.

Type:

float

scheduler_type

Scheduler type ("cosine", "constant", or "linear_warmup_then_constant").

Type:

str

max_nan_retries

Maximum retries per batch when NaN is detected.

Type:

int

grad_clip_max_norm

Maximum gradient norm for clipping.

Type:

float

inf_post_clip_threshold

Gradient norm above which the step is considered to have exploding gradients.

Type:

float

min_grad_norm_for_signal

Minimum gradient norm below which gradients are considered zero.

Type:

float

inf_epoch_patience

Consecutive inf-epochs before early stop.

Type:

int

zero_grad_plateau_patience

Consecutive zero-gradient plateau epochs before early stop.

Type:

int

use_galore

Whether to enable GaLore low-rank gradient projection.

Type:

bool

galore_rank

Rank for GaLore SVD projection.

Type:

int

galore_update_interval

Steps between GaLore projection updates.

Type:

int

galore_scale

Scaling factor for GaLore projected gradients.

Type:

float

galore_max_dim

Maximum dimension for GaLore projection.

Type:

int

use_amp

Whether to use automatic mixed precision (FP16/BF16).

Type:

bool

checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500
csv_log_path: str = 'training_metrics.csv'
csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True
enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True
galore_max_dim: int = 4096
galore_rank: int = 64
galore_scale: float = 1.0
galore_update_interval: int = 1
gpu_metrics_backend: str = 'nvml'
gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: float | None = None
gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True
gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0
gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0
gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0
grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0
gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4
gradient_log_interval: int = 100
inf_epoch_patience: int = 5
inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0
log_gradient_stats: bool = True
max_nan_retries: int = 3
max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3
min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10
nan_check_interval: int = 10
num_best_checkpoints: int = 2
nvml_device_index: int = 0
optimizer_class: str = 'adamw'
optimizer_parameters: Dict[str, Any]
scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000
scheduler_type: str = 'cosine'
scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1
switch_on_thermal: bool = False
telemetry_log_interval: int = 1
use_amp: bool = False
use_galore: bool = False
zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5
